name: girih
comment: The five Islamic girih tiles (Lu & Steinhardt 2007), fivefold D=20 grid (1 unit = 18deg). Regular decagon + pentagon, plus three composite tiles: the wide rhombus (torange, 72/108), the elongated hexagon (bobbin/shesh band, 72/144), and the non-convex bowtie (sormeh dan, 72/72/216 with a 216deg REFLEX corner = 12 units). Angles are interior-angle words in D-units, sum = (n-2)*(D/2). Solve+prune only (develop is zeta24-only, cannot render fivefold). See docs/ISLAMIC_TILINGS.md. NOTE: the reflex bowtie needs gen_alphabet.py min_len=2 (reflex-composite gate) so the valence-2 notch-fill vertex (bowtie 216 + decagon 144 = 360) is admitted.
